name: orbit-personal-hub
description: A calm personal hub for bookmarks, plans and todos.

scripts.test: python3 -m compileall backend run.py tests && node --check public/app.js && python3 tests/test_rbac.py && python3 tests/test_excerpt_permissions.py && python3 tests/test_folder_sort.py && python3 tests/test_hermes_agent.py && python3 tests/test_library.py && python3 tests/test_lx_music.py
